name: Ghoul Fist
implicitMods: Inflict Cold Exposure on Hit, applying -11% to Cold Resistance

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with a duration.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% more Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with an area of effect.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% increased Area of Effect
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Area Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants mana regeneration to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby Allies Regenerate 33 Mana per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Your and nearby allies' Skills Cost no Mana
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that lets you and your allies cast skills without paying their mana costs.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants additional energy shield and increased energy shield recharge rate to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 60 additional Energy Shield
You and nearby Allies gain 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
Your and nearby allies' Energy Shield Recharges are not delayed by Damage
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that prevents energy shield recharge being delayed by damage taken for you and your allies.

typeLine: Examiner's Quartz Flask of the Ibex
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Kingmaker
explicitMods: Nearby Allies have 30% increased Item Rarity
Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent your Melee Attacks
Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier
flavourText: A King and his people are linked together
like a soul and a beating heart.
Both can be severed by a same edge,
then forged anew.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods:
15% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
80% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Anathema
explicitMods: 14% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Cast a Curse Spell
Your Curse Limit is equal to your maximum Power Charges
flavourText: Enraged by the incompetence of mortals
The demon-lord opens a gateway
Unleashing a litany of pain upon the world.

name: Heretic's Veil
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 22 Blasphemy
Socketed Curse Gems have 30% increased Reservation Efficiency
flavourText: Branded a heretic for your beliefs,
You stand alone against many.
May the truth that fuels their anger,
Carry your blade into their hearts.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, causing them to be debilitated when they hit enemies and increasing damage they take while on low life.
explicitMods: Cursed Enemies take 60% increased Damage while on Low Life
Cursed Enemies are Debilitated for 3.00 Seconds when they Hit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their elemental resistances.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -30% to Elemental Resistances
20% increased Duration of Elemental Ailments on Cursed enemies
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Lightning, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their lightning resistance and giving them a chance to be shocked when hit.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -37% to Lightning Resistance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +25% chance to Shock
Shocks on Cursed enemies have 20% increased Duration
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Cold, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Perquil's Toe
explicitMods: Lightning Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Lucky
Nearby Allies' Damage with Hits is Lucky
flavourText: He was a lot luckier before he lost this.

name: Soul Ripper
explicitMods: Loses all Charges when you enter a new area
Gain Vaal Souls equal to Charges Consumed when used
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "What care have I for their pain? They're already dead."
- Atalui, Vaal Priestess

name: Replica Doedre's Damning
explicitMods: You can apply one fewer Curse
flavourText: "Prototype #8 makes it difficult to think negatively, but two fatalities
resulted when a lead researcher used an epithet in its presence."

name: The Torrent's Reclamation
explicitMods: Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Time Skill
flavourText: <<HBGAa>><<HBG02>><<HBGAr>><<HBG01>><<HBGAl>>

typeLine: Examiner's Basalt Flask of the Pangolin
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

name: Garb of the Ephemeral
implicitMods: +5% to Quality of Socketed Dexterity Gems
explicitMods: Gain a Divine Charge on Hit

You gain Divinity for 10 seconds on reaching maximum Divine Charges
Lose all Divine Charges when you gain Divinity
Nearby Allies' Action Speed cannot be modified to below Base Value
Nearby Enemies cannot deal Critical Strikes
flavourText: Exceptional men and women of strong will can flicker a spark,
but something much greater is needed to unleash the wildfire of true divine flames.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all enemies in an area, lowering their action speed and making other effects on them expire more slowly.
explicitMods: 50% less Effect of Curse against Players
Cursed Normal and Magic Enemies have 30% less Action Speed
Other effects on Cursed enemies expire 25% slower
Cursed Rare and Unique Enemies have 19% less Action Speed

Supported Curse Skills apply their Curses as Auras

110% increased Area of Effect of Supported Curse Skills
Enemies have Malignant Madness if they have been in Auras from Supported Skills for more than 5 seconds

flavourText: Even trapped in stone, the Elder's shadow lingered
in their hearts and coiled around their dreams.

The haunting screams, a maddening hell.
